Decision Intelligence with AI

Authored by Bart Czernicki

Interactive companion website to the Decision Intelligence with AI book.

Start reading Browse chapters

Contents

Decision Intelligence

Introducing the Decision Intelligence Framework A readable introduction to decisions, decision quality, and the Decision Intelligence Framework. Decision Framing How to shape the decision problem before evaluating options or recommendations. Gathering Intelligence Reducing uncertainty with data, evidence, historical context, and generative AI support. Decision Execution The bridge between choosing and acting, including forms of execution and accountability. Decision Execution with Intuition When intuition helps, when it fails, and how it fits into systematic decision work. Decision Execution with Decision Rules Reusable rules, heuristics, and domain-specific patterns for consistent decisions. Decision Execution with Quantitative Methods Using probability, measurement, and simulation to make better quantitative choices. Decision Communication Communicating decisions so people understand the conclusion, rationale, and action. Applying the Decision Intelligence Framework An end-to-end example that brings the framework components together. Enterprise Decision Intelligence How decision systems become repeatable, observable, explainable, and scalable.
